Meaning.En: A system of tracks (rails) on which trains run, typically including infrastructure such as stations, signals, and rolling stock.
Meaning.Example: The new high-speed railway connects the capital city to the coastal resort in under two hours.

Situation.Vi: Hệ thống đường ray dùng để vận chuyển hành khách và hàng hóa bằng tàu hỏa.
Situation.En: A network of rails used for transporting passengers and freight by train.

Situation.Vi: Cơ sở hạ tầng và dịch vụ liên quan đến vận tải đường sắt.
Situation.En: The infrastructure and services related to rail transport, including tracks, stations, and train operations.
